query: SELECT u.username, u.name, o.status, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.deliveryPersonId = u.id WHERE u.username IN ('Abdu', 'Ammar') GROUP BY u.username, u.name, o.status ORDER BY u.username, o.status;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT u.username, u.name, o.status, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.deliveryPersonId = u.id WHERE u.username IN ('Abdu', 'Ammar') GROUP BY u.username, u.name, o.status ORDER BY u.username, o.status;
